title: Linux Unusual Outbound Connection Frequency
description: Detects hosts making an unusually high number of outbound connections, which may indicate C2 beaconing, data exfiltration, or scanning activity.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (msg like '*CONNECT*' or msg like '*TCP*') | stats count as connection_count, distinctcount('Destination IP') as unique_destinations by 'Host Name' | where connection_count > 500 or unique_destinations > 50 | sort -connection_count
notes: High connection count to many unique IPs suggests scanning. Regular connections to few IPs at fixed intervals suggests C2 beaconing.
